title: Mindfulness in the focus of the neurosciences - The contribution of neuroimaging to the understanding of mindfulness.

assets.abstract: Mindfulness affects human levels of experience by facilitating the immediate and impartial perception of phenomena, including sensory stimulation, emotions, and thoughts. Mindfulness is now a focus of neuroimaging, since technical and methodological developments in magnetic resonance imaging have made it possible to observe subjects performing mindfulness tasks. We set out to describe the association between mental processes and characteristics of mindfulness, including their specific cerebral p
